title: Working will not save me
publicDomainBasis: Robert Lowry (1826–1899), Robert Lowry (1826–1899). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
Chorus
Chorus
Chorus
sections.text:
Praying will not save me;
All the prayers that I could say
Could not wash my sins away,
All I owe could never pay:
Praying will not save me.

sections.label: Chorus
